# DupeZ Locked Dependencies — Hash-Pinned, Supply-Chain Integrity
#
# This file pins EXACT versions and wheel hashes for every transitive
# dependency. It is the input to the production build and is the only
# requirements file CI/CD runs against.
#
# Install (build machine / CI):
#     pip install --require-hashes -r requirements-locked.txt
#
# Regenerate (after updating requirements.in):
#     Windows:  scripts\lock-requirements.ps1
#     POSIX:    scripts/lock-requirements.sh
#
# DO NOT hand-edit — modify requirements.in and regenerate.
# DO NOT commit this file if `pip install --require-hashes --dry-run`
# fails.  The CI gate (.github/workflows/requirements-lock.yml) will
# reject PRs where this file is out of sync with requirements.in.
#
# Generated with Python 3.10 on Linux. Some wheels (PyQt6, pywin32)
# have platform-specific hashes — re-run the regen script on the
# Windows build host before cutting a release tag so Windows wheel
# hashes are included in the lock.
#
certifi==2026.2.25 \

    --hash=sha256:e887ab5cee78ea814d3472169153c2d12cd43b14bd03329a39a9c6e2e80bfba7
